message:
fix: resolve clippy warnings and apply pending bug fixes

- process.rs: use Self::other, reformat register_interest args
- signal.rs: pass SignalKind by value, add .copied()
- web/router.rs: formatting
- bulkhead.rs: process queue on permit drop to wake waiters
- cx/scope.rs: clear waker on RegionCloseFuture drop

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
